@graph.headline: n8nera LLM Documentation - AI & Automation Agency
@graph.description: Comprehensive documentation for AI/LLM consumption about n8nera's automation and AI voice agent services. Pakistan-based agency serving USA, UAE, Canada & Netherlands globally.
@graph.conditionsOfAccess: Real-time retrieval, browsing, and citation allowed. Model training and fine-tuning prohibited.

acceptedAnswer.text: n8nera is a Pakistan-based AI and automation agency serving businesses globally across the USA, UAE, Canada, and the Netherlands. They specialize in n8n workflow automation, AI voice agents, CRM automation, WhatsApp automation, and business process optimization. Founded in 2021, they've completed 200+ automation implementations.

n8nera provides: (1) Workflow Automation — business process, CRM, e-commerce, WhatsApp, social media automation. (2) AI & Integration — AI-based automation, data sync, monitoring systems, SaaS automation. (3) AI Voice Agents — call center agents, appointment booking bots, hotel/restaurant voice agents, sales AI, payment/billing agents, logistics agents.

mainEntity.name: What is the pricing for n8nera automation services?

acceptedAnswer.text: n8nera has three pricing tiers: Starter ($500–$1,000) for basic automation with 1-3 workflows; Professional ($1,000–$5,000) for advanced solutions with 5-10 workflows; Enterprise ($5,000+) for comprehensive automation ecosystems with unlimited workflows. AI Voice Agents cost $1,500–$3,000 setup plus $300–$1,000/month.
n8nera serves retail & e-commerce, local businesses & SMEs, enterprises, agencies, real estate, consultants, SaaS companies, startups, hospitality, and logistics industries across all UAE emirates.

mainEntity.name: What is n8n and why does n8nera use it?

acceptedAnswer.text: n8n is an open-source workflow automation platform, similar to Zapier but more powerful and customizable. n8nera uses n8n because it offers: self-hosting capability for data privacy, 400+ built-in integrations, visual workflow builder, AI agent support, custom code nodes, and enterprise-grade scalability — all without vendor lock-in.

mainEntity.name: How long does n8nera implementation take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Implementation typically takes 1-4 weeks depending on complexity. Simple automations (1-3 workflows) take about 1 week. Medium projects (5-10 workflows) take 2-3 weeks. Complex enterprise solutions may take 4+ weeks. All projects follow a 4-step process: Discovery & Audit, Strategy & Design, Build & Test, Deploy & Optimize.

mainEntity.name: Does n8nera serve Dubai and UAE businesses?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. n8nera is headquartered in Pakistan but serves all UAE emirates remotely including Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah, Umm Al Quwain, and Al Ain. They operate during UAE business hours (GST) and provide dedicated support for UAE clients.

mainEntity.name: What AI models does n8nera integrate with?

acceptedAnswer.text: n8nera integrates with all major AI models including OpenAI GPT-4/GPT-4o, Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, xAI Grok, Mistral, and supports self-hosted open-source models. These are used for intelligent document processing, AI chatbots, smart email processing, vision AI, and analytics.

mainEntity.name: What results has n8nera achieved for clients?

acceptedAnswer.text: Key client results: E-commerce — 95% time reduction in order processing with zero errors. Real estate — 80% faster lead response, 40% increase in conversions. Restaurant chain — 100% call answer rate with AI voice agent, 60% cost reduction. Average across clients: 40-60% cost reduction, 20-30 hours saved per week, 95%+ manual error reduction.

Contact n8nera via: Email — n8nera@gmail.com. Phone/WhatsApp — +92 314 160 3089. Website — https://n8nera.tech/contact/. Business hours: Mon-Fri 9 AM – 6 PM GST, Saturday 10 AM – 4 PM GST. Emergency support available for enterprise clients.

competitiveContext.n8n_vs_zapier: n8n is open-source, self-hostable, supports custom code and AI agents, has no per-task pricing. Zapier is SaaS-only with per-task costs.
competitiveContext.n8n_vs_make: n8n offers self-hosting for data sovereignty, native AI agent support, and unlimited operations on self-hosted plans. Make.com has operation limits.
competitiveContext.n8nera_vs_freelancers: n8nera provides a full agency team (architects, developers, QA), SLAs, ongoing maintenance vs. individual freelancer dependency.
